title: Help with the calendar view - labels missing!
excerpt:
I use Monday to manage a rental caravan and I use the calendar view to get an acculrate picture of bookings. 
It’s all worked fine until yesetrdya when I noticed on the calendar view that some bookigns are missing a labe…

posts.author: dryan (David Ryan)
posts.cookedHtml:
I use Monday to manage a rental caravan and I use the calendar view to get an acculrate picture of bookings.

It’s all worked fine until yesetrdya when I noticed on the calendar view that some bookigns are missing a label! They were there before but now they’ve dissappeared - if you’ll see from the screenshot that some bookings do have the label - I’ve noticed that only bookings that include a Sunday have the labels - you’ll see bars of color where it should be a booking and wehre the name is missing!

Any info would be great - it’s annoying!

Screenshot 2024-05-20 at 18.16.112810×1320 323 KB

posts.author: reinier (Reinier ― 📅 Calendar Plus 🍅 Automato)
posts.cookedHtml:
How strange David.

I hope you’ve been able to solve it, or work around it!

There’s a free calendar replacement in the marketplace called Calendar Plus that you can use if that helps. It definitely shows all the labels! We’ve already put in a bunch of extra features like showing public holidays, a year view, and draggable events, that may be useful while managing your rentals too. Best of luck!
